steps.t: The guards at the southern entrance to the Vale of Imladris are atop the road that winds up the southern slope from the guest rooms. Boromir has asked…
Boromir is in one of the guest rooms of Elrond's House. The guards at the southern entrance to the valley have politely rebuffed Boromir's offer of ai…
The Hall of Fire is on the first floor of the House of Elrond, in Rivendell. Boromir chafes at the lack of respect for your people's sacrifices that h…
Boromir is in one of the guest rooms of Elrond's House. You have spoken of the deeds of Men in the Hall of Fire and should now return to Boromir.
